ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Is_Overridden__c, OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Override_Action__c)), ISBLANK(Override_Reason__c), ISBLANK(Override_Approved_On__c), ISBLANK(Override_Approved_By__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When Is Overridden is checked, Override Action, Override Reason, and Override Approved On are required.
